description: Added `invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['admin', 'logs'] })` to `useDeleteAdminUser` so the Recent Admin Activity table refreshes after a user deletion without manual page refresh.

asi.hypothesis: useDeleteAdminUser was missing audit logs invalidation, causing stale Recent Activity table
asi.root_cause: onSuccess only invalidated ['admin','users'] and ['admin','metrics'] but not ['admin','logs']
asi.same_bug_in: useBanUser, useUnbanUser, useUpdateAdminUser and all other admin mutations also skip ['admin','logs'] invalidation
